pages.title: First Priorities
pages.text: 1. Fill your canteen and find a route to purified water.$(br2)2. Activate any Waystone you find and intend to use.$(br2)3. Establish shelter before night.$(br2)4. Save the Glock for threats that cannot be handled quietly.

pages.title: Know the Controls
pages.text: Firearm controls are configurable. Check the Controls menu for PointBlank's Reload Gun, Change Fire Mode, Inspect Gun, Attachment Mode, and Switch Scope. This manual names the actions instead of assuming a particular key layout.

pages.title: Entering Buildings
pages.text: A building warning means its containers are locked until the encounter is cleared. Do not let the kill target distract you from the enemies already loaded around you. Boss sites give a separate warning before the Brute arrives.
